programme.title: Save The Rhino Day Specials
programme.desc: A baby White Rhinoceros is trapped in a mudhole! Can the Junior Rangers get it out?

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Two Panther Chameleons who want the same tree! The competition is on!

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Oh no! Someone is stung by the Brazilian Yellow Scorpion!

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers help Peyo befriend a Llama.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: ‘Doctor' Talking Hank sets out to cure the world, one friend at a time.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: A wealthy opportunity arises when a hotshot billionaire gets stranded in Talking Tom's garage.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Art of the Steal: A fieldtrip to the Greenville Museum of Art is interrupted by a critical mission: work as a team to save the museum's most precious painting from two clever art thieves.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Hammy: Hammy, the new class pet and mascot, teaches the kids about taking care of a pet — and the kind of trouble a hungry super-powered hamster can cause!

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Toadally Magical Adventure: Toad loses a magic wand to the Koopas. / When the Mario Brothers go back to Brooklyn, they are mistaken as babysitters to look after Junior. Mario & Luigi must control and get Junior back home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Oh Brother / Mighty Plumber: When Mario and Luigi get fed up with each other, Luigi soon finds himself having to save his brother from Koopa and Kooky. / Koopa brings TV hero Mighty Plumber to life and tricks him into robbing the Pipe Land Treasury.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Three Sides to Every Story: When it's discovered that Eon has been vaporized, Jet-Vac interrogates his three suspects.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Days of Future Crash: To gain info about the Wumpa Islands, Eruptor and Dark Spyro travel back in time to their first encounter with Crash Bandico

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - The Wizard of Odd: Pac and Fuzbitz go through a space worm to an odd world where doppelgangers of everyone they know are characters from familiar, but slightly off stories.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Indiana Pac and the Dentures of Doom: The diabolical dentures of an evil Mummy wizard could cause the destruction of PacWorld if they are reunited with their malicious master.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - The Mysterious Masked Bandits! / The Mysterious Brawler: While studying Bakugan energy, Wynton detects strange energy spikes emitting from somewhere in Los Volmos. / Notorious thieves, the Mad Masks are still at large, and have set their sights on ancient Bakugan left in AAAnimus care.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Princess of the Garbage Heap! / The Mysterious Cyptid, Wolfman!: Lia is fed up with the messy state of Studio D, it's time to clean it up! / With their videos view counting hitting a new low, the Awesome Brawlers head out into the wilderness to capture footage of the cryptid known as: Wolfman!

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Raiders of the Lost Jewel / In Gronk We Trust: Professor Woodraven enlists the help of the Paq to find the famed Jewel of Kaheelee hidden somewhere in the wilds outside of Orlanta. Himari, Fleming, and Klaus jump at the chance, but not all is as it seems. When the Professor turns out to be an impostor, the Paw must race to save the precious jewel from the thief. / Shaq hosts a charity basketball game and tasks each member of the Paq with picking up items and helping set up for the event. Gronk begs Shaq to let him pick up the most important item, the winning trophy, and Shaq agrees. The rest of the Paq thinks it's a bad idea, but Gronk aims to prove them wrong. After getting distracted multiple times, Gronk has to dig deep to prove that Shaq's trust in his wasn't a mistake.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious "Giver," who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East. But when a group of thieves make off with the Giver's precious cargo of slugs, our heroes must ride to the rescue-and discover the secret of who the Giver really is.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns. The Shane Gang search for a way to defeat the new creations, but when the Emperor places a bounty on Junjie's head, they also have to deal with the Dai-Fu and hordes of the Emperor's Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Eastern Champion
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends and even some old enemies-to help them take down the Emperor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs-in Eli's absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos! It's up to Eli to restore the balance, but the Shadow Clan aren't as friendly as they once were...and that's saying something. Help comes from an unexpected source-Tad and his slug Pieper, who just arrived from the Surface!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad's hypnotic slug Pieper has gone megamorph, his gang of supporters all have Gattler blasters, and Tad's control over his army of ghouls is stronger than Dr. Blakk's ever was. The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad's plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Let's Move!
programme.desc: ducktv's let's move! episodes are all about sports, physical exercises and outdoor adventures. This section promotes movement and motor skills, develops basic coordination and a sense of rhythm through exercising.

programme.desc: ducktv favorites are the most popular ducktv shows, representing different educational values. Just to name a few, the series Mimo and Bobo develops social skills, Fireteam fosters problem- solving, while Shaping Up promotes shape and color identification.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: TOBOT
programme.desc: Ryan and Kory are twin brothers with one big secret: They're Tobot pilots.

programme.title: Winx Club
programme.desc: Winx Club is a fantasy saga revolving around six fairies and their adventures. The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Space Yoghurt
programme.desc: Migol, Popodom and Drod bump into unusual problems in space that they manage to solve in equally unusual ways, but at least everything ends well when you can laugh together. Follow the space creatures on their fun and wacky adventures!

programme.title: Invent'Tom
programme.desc: Meet Tom, Car City's very own inventor! In his high-tech lab, he creates the wackiest inventions to solve his friend's problems.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Pincode - A Hurricane for Dare: Carlin says he can predict earthquakes, but Dokko doesn't believe him until one happens! Even then Dokko sets out to prove that it was only a coincidence, and that earthquakes cannot be predicted. In this episode, kids learn about the causes of earthquakes, volcanoes, and wind storms.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Pincode - A Trace on the Snow: Pin misses his Bi-Bi and wants to find a way to see and communicate with him across great distances. He decides he wants a moving picture so he can see Bi-Bi in action! In this episode, kids learn about movies and video and how they are processed and made. Featuring scientist Vladimir Kozmich Zvorikin.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Beach Rescue: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks: Rodeo and Booster's friends dress up for Halloween, but Zitron gets in the way of the fun. Robo to the rescue.

programme.title: Tiny Town

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.sub-title: Amado libera a Javi y al Rojo

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Diana se defiende y evita que uno de los hermanos Ramos la viole. Mientras, Águila Azul prepara un operativo para su rescate. Aurelio va en ambulancia al hospital.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresivo al rancho de los hermanos Ramos, a cargo de Águila Azul, termina con la vida de los secuestradores y Diana en libertad, sana y salva. Aurelio es sometido a cirugía.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.sub-title: A Diana le atrae Águila Azul
programme.desc: Agradecida por salvarle la vida, Diana le confiesa a Águila Azul que estaba enamorada de Aurelio cuando era pequeña. El Chivo, objetivo militar de el Cabo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Cuando el padre de Diana anuncia el retiro de su candidatura, el Cabo y sus hombres disparan a matar. Una ambulancia lo traslada al hospital más cercano. Alba acaba con el Mocho de un plomazo.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Gabriel y su hijastra Patricia se besaron en un restaurante y Yadira difundió en las redes la foto del hecho con toda la mala intención. Yamilet, para pagarse sus estudios universitarios, decidió ser una "sugar baby", una chica que acompaña a señores que pagan por su compañía supuestamente sin tener sexo, pero una mañana amanece presuntamente violada por su "sugar daddy".

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Divorcio a la italiana Parto a puñaladas
programme.desc: Yunet y su esposo Alex vivían en Italia él viajó a Miami, la dejó abandonada con sus hijos y tramitó el divorcio. Junior tenía esposa y dos amantes, una de ellas volvió su vida un horror.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Mi hermana no está bien El cáncer de los músicos
programme.desc: José pide que su hermana interne a su hijo esquizofrénico porque es peligroso, ella califica como accidente lo ocurrido. María es saxofonista y falló en un concierto, demanda a Paula por daños.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Omar es un terapeuta de parejas que se involucró con una de sus pacientes. Esta falta de ética profesional suele salir bien cara y su licencia puede ser revocada. Cristina y su pareja, para renovar su relación, deciden buscar un amor unicornio, que consiste en tener relaciones sexuales con una chica por un solo un día sin contactara nunca más.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Raquel demanda a su mamá, quien no le da su dinero, compite con ella y le quita los novios. Elizabeth se niega a que el papá de su hija regrese porque es adicto y un mal ejemplo para su nieta.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Fue por lana Saco de maíz
programme.desc: Manuel dio sus ahorros para pagar el rescate del supuesto secuestro de su hermano, descubre que es una estafa. Juan Camilo se niega a volver a Colombia a cultivar maíz como quieren sus padres.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Andrea tuvo relaciones con el esposo de su maestra, ella lo denunció sin saber que era gay y el niño se suicidó. Catherine sufre de acoso en silencio, y un amigo lo publica.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Carlos acaba de salir de prisión y su esposa acaba de entrar, luego de intentar asesinarlo. La hija de ambos está con la tía Catalina, quien se disputa la custodia de la niña con Carlos, que nunca la quiso. En otro caso, Alex pasó unos días en casa de una pareja de amigos que hacían el amor con tanto énfasis que él se sintió con el derecho de aprovechar un momento que su amigo fue al baño y se metió en la cama con la mujer, quien ahora lo acusa de violación.

programme.title: Tengo talento, mucho talento

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Don Camerino le da un ascenso a Ludovico y necesita estar bien descansado para cumplir sus nuevas obligaciones. Ludovico le pide a Federica que lo deje dormir. Al día siguiente, Ludovico se duerme en la oficina y no puede cumplir bien con su trabajo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Una de las alumnas de Paco lo visita y se pone borracha con él, su padre va a buscarla y él culpa a Fran de pasar la noche con ella.

programme.desc: Magdalena busca la manera de quedar bien con el jefe de su esposo en la cena. Magdalena confunde a un cobrador con el jefe de su esposo y lo atiende cordialmente.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena y Arturo se van de viaje a Guadalajara. Marcos y Alejandra aprovechan para hacer una fiesta con sus amigos, a la que también asisten los vecinos.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Una amiga extranjera de Fran llega a pasar unos días al departamento, pero descubren que fue deportada de Estados Unidos. Sin embargo, crea una relación muy estrecha con Lucas.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco cuenta la historia de que fue futbolista y en un reencuentro se lástima, pero consigue que una guapa terapeuta lo atienda. Paco se enamora de ella y se sube una vez más a la nube de la ilusión.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Una bella terapeuta llega a atender a Paco y sus dolencias, por lo que él no pierde la oportunidad para coquetearle, pero fracasa en el intento de conquista cuando confunde lo profesional con lo personal.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Lucas compromete a Brayan a una pelea clandestina, por lo que deciden prepararlo como a un profesional. Sin embargo, el día del encuentro Toña queda envuelta en la pelea.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: En una fiesta de Lucas, una guapa chica le dice a Paco que no está tan mal, pero que se podría ver mejor si se da una manita de gato.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Brayan y Toña van al velorio de la abuelita de su primo el Natas, pero de regreso se traen un espíritu del panteón.

programme.title: 40 y 20

programme.title: La fea más bella

programme.title: La fea más bella

programme.desc: Omar urge a Fernando que encuentre la bolsa roja, pues si cae en manos equivocadas, se sabrá todo lo que han ocultado para salvar la empresa: Fernando le dice a Sara que la bolsa tiene muestras para laboratorio.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Fernando confunde a Marcia con Lety por teléfono Marcia le dice a Fernando que no lo quiere perder, Lety se convence de dejarlo ir.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Alicia cuestiona a las del cuartel y culpa a Juanita de haber tomado la bolsa Matilde intenta besar a Tomás durante la filmación, pero él le dice que se casará con Leticia.

programme.desc: Luigi se va a Alemania para filmar el comercial de Sport Wing Fernando le entrega a Lety un dibujo que le hizo Lety habla por teléfono en clave con Teresita para explicarle su encargo.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel busca a Teo para pedirle que se infiltre en la logia Joaquín le insiste a Pilar que se drogue y acepte tener relaciones con él Mia se molesta al descubrir que Vanesa en realidad es Valeria Paola debe tener relaciones sexuales con Diego.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego le confiesa a Paola que es virgen Franco le pide a Miguel que lo ayude a encontrar a Mia Pascual expulsará a Joaquín porque encontró a Vico en su cama Mia descubre que su papá había andado con Valeria antes de conocer a su mamá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Joaquín le dice a Pilar que Vico le puso una trampa para separarlos Miguel planea que Rodrigo invite a Teo a formar parte de la logia Tomás cree que Lulú se podría fijar en él Celina le dice a Mia que Valeria podría decirle todo sobre su mamá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Teo comienza su iniciación con la Logia. Valeria le confiesa a Mía muchas cosas malas sobre su madre. Gracias a las mentiras de Joaquín, Pilar regresa con él. Nico se enoja con Lupita por hablar con Abraham.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Esteban sorprende a los alumnos viendo una película porno Pilar amenaza a Vico Julieta termina con Miguel porque sabe que está enamorado de Mia Teo y Miguel se agarran a golpes Franco se enoja con Valeria por contarle a Mia sobre su mamá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lupita le cuenta a Mía que Teo se metió en la Logia para ayudar a Miguel. Luego, Mía impide que Vico se drogue. Mientras tanto, José le hace creer a Teo que Roberta está enamorada de él.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía acusa a Miguel con Esteban por espiarla en el baño de mujeres. Por su parte, Madariaga le dice a Vico que se quiera a sí misma. Además, Mía y Celina se reconcilian con Vico.

programme.title: Buddy Rich, Tom Warrington, Bob Kaye & John Marshall
programme.sub-title: Buddy Rich Big Band - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Buddy Rich, one of the most influential jazz drummers of all time, performed at the North Sea Jazz Festival of 1978 with his orchestra. Rich's drumming was known for its remarkable speed and dexterity, which he achieved without any formal education.

programme.title: 3 Cohens sextet
programme.desc: They are three siblings, born in Israel, passed through New York, each leading brilliant careers. The youngest, Avishai, has established himself as one of the most original trumpet players of the moment, author of highly acclaimed albums on the ECM label. The second youngest, Anat, saxophonist and clarinetist, in love with Brazilian music and Benny Goodman, is one of the great "jazzwomen" of today. Less visible, but no less active, the elder Yuval, who plays soprano sax, is one of the most respected musicians in Israeli jazz. Under the name "Three Cohens", they periodically get together for the pleasure of swinging together, as they did as teenagers.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Jamie Cullum
programme.desc: Watch the performance of Jamie Cullum live at Jazz à Vienne, in 2017.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.sub-title: Brooks Bowman/Jazzmeia Horn, East Of The Sun
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: Sarah Vaughan, Richard Davis, Ronnell Bright & Art Morgan
programme.desc: Sarah Vaughan: Live in '58 & 64 features the Divine One in her prime, wrapping her sultry voice around jazz standards such as “Lover Man”, “Misty”, and “I Got Rhythm” and popular showtunes such as “Over The Rainbow” and “Maria”. One of the greatest voices of the 20th Century, her renditions of songs by Harold Arlen, Leonard Bernstein, Johnny Burke, the Gershwins, and Stephen Sondheim are pure diva magic. These three performances demonstrate why Sarah Vaughan is invariably mentioned in the same breath as Ella Fitzgerald and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: Sun Ra
programme.sub-title: Sun Ra Arkestra - Estival Jazz Lugano
programme.desc: Estival Jazz Lugano is an annual open-air music festival that takes place over five days at the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. On July 3, 1985, pianist and space-faring jazz icon Sun Ra and his Arkestra crash-landed at Estival Jazz Lugano. Featuring saxophonists Marshall Allen, John Gilmore and Danny Ray Thompson, clarinetist Eloe Omoe, flautist James Jackson, trombonist Tyrone Hill and a cavalcade of other costumed talents, Sun Ra puts on a truly out-of-this-world concert.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Lily Maisky, Iddo Bar-Shai & Tedi Papavrami
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration III
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored chamber music repertoire in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Lily Maisky and Iddo Bar-Shaï, violinists Tedi Papavrami and Akiko Suwanai, her daughter Lyda Chen-Argerich on viola, and cellist Mischa Maisky. On the program are Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio No. 1 in D minor, Op. 49 Leoš Janáček's Violin Sonata Franz Schubert's Rondo in A major, D. 951 and Johannes Brahms's Piano Quartet No. 3 in C minor, Op. 60. These performances were recorded on May 4 and June 13, 2021.

programme.title: Mariss Jansons
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Franz Welser-Möst & Cleveland Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Franz in Vienna: Mozart and Schoenberg
programme.desc: Austrian conductor Franz Welser-Möst leads his Cleveland Orchestra in a performance of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Divertimento No. 2 in D major, KV 131, and Arnold Schoenberg's Variations for Orchestra, Op. 31, recorded at Severance Hall in Cleveland, USA. In addition, Welser-Möst takes a walk through ‘his' Vienna, enlightening us on this musical capital that was home to both Mozart and Schoenberg. He contrasts the Divertimento No. 2, written by 16-year-old Mozart, with Variations for Orchestra, by the mature Schoenberg.

programme.title: Jos van Immerseel, Anima Eterna Brugge, Claron McFadden & Bart Van Caenegem
programme.desc: Belgian conductor Jos van Immerseel leads Anima Eterna Brugge in a concert program dedicated to American composer George Gershwin. The program opens with Gershwin's symphonic suite Catfish Row (arr. Steven D. Bowen) which is based upon music from his famous opera Porgy and Bess (1935). This is followed by the well-known tone poem An American in Paris (1928). After, soprano Claron McFadden joins the orchestra, presenting a selection of Gershwin's classic jazz songs, including ‘The man I love' (1924-27), ‘I got rhythm' (1930), and ‘By Strauss' (1936). She also performs ‘My man's gone now' and ‘Summertime' from Porgy and Bess. The concert ends with Gershwin's celebrated Rhapsody in Blue, with Bart Van Caenegem as featured pianist. This performance was recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, on March 3, 2017.

programme.title: Kevin John Edusei
programme.desc: In October 2020, German conductor Kevin John Edusei made his London Symphony Orchestra debut and leads the orchestra in a beautiful performance of the suite from Mendelssohn's “A Midsummer Night's Dream”, Boulanger's “D'un matin de printemps” and Schumann's 'Spring' Symphony. Edusei is regularly praised for the drama and tension that he brings to his music-making, and for his clear sense of architecture and attention to detail.

programme.title: David Gilmour
programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Genesis
programme.desc: "Three Sides Live" was filmed in November 1981 on the "Abacab" tour in North America. Originally filmed in 16mm, the footage has now been fully restored. The show focuses on tracks from the "Duke" and "Abacab" albums and the tracks are intercut with behind the scenes footage and interviews with the band members. As ever with Genesis, the show is visually stunning and it captures the band in their transition from their progressive days in the seventies through to the hugely successful pop/rock act they became from the mid-eighties onwards. Genesis have always been great live performers and "Three Sides Live" is a great addition to any fans collection.

programme.title: Jeff Beck
programme.sub-title: Rock and Roll Party Honoring Les Paul
programme.desc: Filmed on 9 June 2010 at the Irridium Jazz Club in New York City, forever associated with the legendary Les Paul, this show captures Jeff Beck celebrating the great man with a selection of Les Paul songs and other great rock 'n' roll tracks on what would have been Les Paul's 95th birthday. Jeff Beck is joined by some very special guests including Imelda May and her band led by Darrel Higham on many of the tracks plus appearances by Gary US Bonds, Brian Setzer and Trombone Shorty. The intimate setting puts you right there in the audience for a performance featuring stunning musicianship and truly great songs.

programme.title: Linkin Park
programme.desc: Filmed at the Madison Square Garden in New York, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Linkin Park performs hits including "Numb", "In The End", "Bleed it Out" and many more.

Distant waves break and birds chirp adding an a nice ambient music that combines to create a video that's so relaxing it's almost trance-inducing.

programme.title: Nature Relaxation Journey Part 1

programme.title: Blue Horizons
programme.desc: Blue Horizons features a diverse set of strikingly blue nature video scenes from places like Hawaii, Mexico, Canada, and California. It is paired with a custom written ambient track by Travis Revell / Relax Moods. ABOUT THE COLOR BLUE: The color blue has a cooling, and soothing effect upon the nervous system, and upon the bloody and bodily organs. "Turquoise is cerebrally calming, and is an effective color for sound sleep. Blue stimulates intuitive powers and is a vitality builder, and is also said to help activate the pineal gland as it is the color of the spirit." -From the book Color Medicine by C. Klotsche*
